name: DNC HQ
subject: Our first deadline of 2018 is here, Derek
body:
The first fundraising deadline of 2018 is on Wednesday. Chip in now to stand with Democrats:
---
One thing is clear, Derek: Democrats are poised to make a serious comeback this year.

But in order to take advantage of this opportunity, we will need the resources to mobilize millions of voters across the country. Investing in grassroots organizing has never been as critical as it is right now -- and we are counting on your support ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline on Wednesday.

**Make a $3 contribution today -- before Wednesday's deadline -- to give Democrats the resources to organize in every single state across the country. Your support makes this work possible.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522225/4067b0a/4bc7cabfc/7e501310/3990535534/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/january-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180128_abl_dnc&source=em_20180128_abl_dnc&refcode=em_20180128_abl_dnc")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522225/4067b0a/4bc7cabfc/7e501311/3990535534/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/january-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180128_abl_dnc&source=em_20180128_abl_dnc&refcode=em_20180128_abl_dnc")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522225/4067b0a/4bc7cabfc/7e50131e/3990535534/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/january-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180128_abl_dnc&source=em_20180128_abl_dnc&refcode=em_20180128_abl_dnc")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522225/4067b0a/4bc7cabfc/7e50131f/3990535534/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/january-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180128_abl_dnc&source=em_20180128_abl_dnc&refcode=em_20180128_abl_dnc")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522225/4067b0a/4bc7cabfc/7e50131c/3990535534/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/january-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180128_abl_dnc&source=em_20180128_abl_dnc&refcode=em_20180128_abl_dnc")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522225/4067b0a/4bc7cabfc/7e50131d/3990535534/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/january-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180128_abl_dnc&source=em_20180128_abl_dnc&refcode=em_20180128_abl_dnc")
** Our comeback starts with you, Derek. You have the power to make a difference in this election by talking to your neighbors, friends, and family about what's at stake.

That's how Democrats will win this year -- with lots of people getting involved and contributing their time, energy, and donations to help get our country back on track. We can take back Congress and flip statehouses nationwide, but only with your help.

When we look back at the first month of 2018, I want us to be able to say we did everything we could to start this election year off strong. Are you in?

**[Chip in $3 right now ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline if you're ready to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522225/4067b0a/4bc7cabfc/7e50131a/3990535534/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/january-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Chip+in++if+consinConsGroup28497++set+ma&utm_campaign=em_20180128_abl_dnc&source=em_20180128_abl_dnc&refcode=em_20180128_abl_dnc")**

There's no match for millions of people coming together to fight for our shared values. Thanks for standing with Democrats.

Amanda

Amanda Brown Lierman
Political and Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

P.S. -- **[If every person who reads this email chips in what they can to support Democrats this year, we will literally be unstoppable this November. Add your $3 donation today.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522225/4067b0a/4bc7cabfc/7e50131b/3990535534/VEsFBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/january-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+If+every+person+who+reads+this+email+chi&utm_campaign=em_20180128_abl_dnc&source=em_20180128_abl_dnc&refcode=em_20180128_abl_dnc")**

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522225/4067b0a/4bc7cabfc/7e501318/3990535534/VEsFBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=33+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180128_abl_dnc&source=em_20180128_abl_dnc&refcode=em_20180128_abl_dnc"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522225/4067b0a/4bc7cabfc/7e501319/3990535534/VEsFAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180128_abl_dnc&source=em_20180128_abl_dnc&refcode=em_20180128_abl_dnc"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522225/4067b0a/4bc7cabfc/7e501326/3990535534/VEsFAA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180128_abl_dnc&source=em_20180128_abl_dnc&refcode=em_20180128_abl_dnc") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522225/4067b0a/4bc7cabfc/7e501327/3990535534/VEsFAw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=36+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180128_abl_dnc&source=em_20180128_abl_dnc&refcode=em_20180128_abl_dnc"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

But in order to take advantage of this opportunity, we will need the resources to mobilize millions of voters across the country. Investing in grassroots organizing has never been as critical as it is right now -- and we are counting on your support ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline on Wednesday. name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
We'll keep this one pretty short this week but wanted to let you
know about some recent news and upcoming events.

Peter, we'll keep this one
pretty short this week but wanted to let you know about some
recent news and upcoming events.

Tune In:

Gov. Kasich will be a guest on
NBC's Late Night w/ Seth Meyers this upcoming Monday evening,
Jan. 29. Hope you can tune in!

On Tuesday, the Governor will
appear on:

Morning Joe (6-9AM ET - MSNBC)

New Day (6-9AM ET - CNN)

Deadline: White House w/ Nicolle
Wallace (4PM ET - MSNBC)

Fundraising Deadline:

We're also up against our January
fundraising deadline. If you'd like to chip in $10, $25, $50 or
whatever you can to help, please visit our secure donation form
(here).

Upcoming Travel:

Last week, we announced that Gov.
Kasich will visit New Hampshire on April 3rd to participate in a
fireside chat as part of the New England College President's
Speaker series.

News:

An Ohio poll was released last
week that showed Gov. Kasich continues to receive high approval
ratings in his job as governor with a 57% approval rating and
only 29% disapproval. This is exceptional in a key battleground
state like Ohio. Conversely, President Trump's rating in the
state is 43% approve and 52% disapprove.

54% of respondents think that
Ohio is on the right track with only 24% saying it's on the wrong
track. This is another strong indicator that Gov. Kasich's
conservative and common-sense policies have bettered the lives of
all Ohioans.

On Thursday, Gov. Kasich
appointed a new Republican Justice to the Ohio Supreme Court.
With the appointment of longtime 7th District Court of Appeals
Judge Mary DeGenaro, the Ohio Supreme Court is now
all-Republican.

Thank you for your ongoing
support!

-Team Kasich

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iW7q0AUoNt

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/oW7q0AUoNt

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-49230625865-echo3-14357060C897BB1E8FBA64EDAC39510C@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Team Donnelly
subject: Your opinion needed (Betsy DeVos)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
How would you rate Betsy DeVos' performance as Education Secretary? |
---

| | | Peter,

**We can't say it enough: Betsy DeVos has been a disaster for our education system.** That's why Joe voted against her confirmation.

But thanks to Senate Republicans -- and an unprecedented, tie-breaking vote from Mike Pence -- she was confirmed anyway. **And she 's been worse than we expected.** She's proposed devastating cuts to our education system, tried to hand money meant for public schools over to private corporations, worked to end programs set up to provide student loan debt relief, and rolled back protections for victims of sexual assault.

**One vote against her could 've prevented her confirmation.**

We need to hear from 1,000 people by the end of the week.

**How would you rate Betsy DeVos' performance as Education Secretary, Peter?**
---
| [**Good**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2216/7377f838/3331f8f2/51fa3ff1/4027600528/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-devossurvey?refcode=20180128.1good&amount=10")
---
| [**Fair**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2216/7377f838/3331f8f2/51fa3ff0/4027600528/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-devossurvey?refcode=20180128.1fair&amount=10")
---
| [**Poor**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2216/7377f838/3331f8f2/51fa3ff3/4027600528/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-devossurvey?refcode=20180128.1poor&amount=10")
---
| [**Very Poor**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2216/7377f838/3331f8f2/51fa3ff2/4027600528/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-devossurvey?refcode=20180128.1verypoor&amount=10")
---
\-- Team Donnelly

| [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2216/7377f838/3331f8f2/51fa3fed/4027600528/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-donate?refcode=20180128.1devos&amount=25")
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206

name: 2018 Democratic Membership
subject: You have not ordered your card yet, Derek
body:
It's time to order your Official 2018 Membership Card. Chip in today:
---
2018 is going to be a busy year, Derek.

**[If you're committed to helping Democrats win, pitch in $10 right now and we'll send you your Official 2018 Democratic Membership Card.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522221/4067b0a/4bbffe719/7e501a1c/2853103489/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018_dnc_card?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+If+youre+committed+to+helping+Democrats+&utm_campaign=em_20180128_dnc_dm&source=em_20180128_dnc_dm&refcode=em_20180128_dnc_dm")**

We're in this together -- because it's going to take every single one of us to win.

**Contribute $10 right now to become a card-carrying Democrat.**

[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522221/4067b0a/4bbffe719/7e501a24/2853103489/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018_dnc_card?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180128_dnc_dm&source=em_20180128_dnc_dm&refcode=em_20180128_dnc_dm")

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: Your official supporter record for 2018 >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c542a/24c69fd9/12b97c8e1/18957292/2474276240/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEM49N_digital_email_20180128_EOMSupRec_inact&source=WQEFEM49N_digital_email_20180128_EOMSupRec_inact")
---

Peter,

In 2017, this community helped elect 42 pro-choice Democratic women.

In 2018, we want to push that number into the _hundreds_.

It's an ambitious plan, but between voters' energy at the grassroots level, the resistance to the Republican agenda, and a wave of women stepping up to run for office, this is the year to do it.

With the end of the month approaching, I'm taking a look at our supporter records to see who's already stepped up this year -- here's what I have down for this email address:
**2018 Donor:** Not yet
**Suggested action:[Donate $3 to help reach our $150,000 End-of-Month goal and help elect pro-choice Democratic women this year.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c542a/24c69fd9/12b97c8e1/18957293/2474276240/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180128_email_EOMJanuary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+if+consinConsGroup12566+again++el&utm_campaign=WQEFEM49N_digital_email_20180128_EOMSupRec_inact&source=WQEFEM49N_digital_email_20180128_EOMSupRec_inact")**
Electing hundreds of women this year isn't out of reach.

We've already endorsed 12 women for the Senate, 31 for the House, seven for governors' seats, and 11 for upcoming local races -- with more to come.

That's not to mention the whopping 598 state legislative seats we're targeting across the country.

If we work hard, we can repeat the success of last year on a massive scale -- and not only put a stop to harmful Republican policies in states and in Congress but also change the face of politics for a generation.

**Donate $3 to help reach our $150,000 End-of-Month goal and elect women up and down the ballot:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-January-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c542a/24c69fd9/12b97c8e1/1895728c/2474276240/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180128_email_EOMJanuary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachJanuaryGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFEM49N_digital_email_20180128_EOMSupRec_inact&source=WQEFEM49N_digital_email_20180128_EOMSupRec_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

**[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c542a/24c69fd9/12b97c8e1/1895728d/2474276240/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180128_email_EOMJanuary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFEM49N_digital_email_20180128_EOMSupRec_inact&source=WQEFEM49N_digital_email_20180128_EOMSupRec_inact")**

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address or offline, thank you! These records may not reflect those additional contributions, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c542a/24c69fd9/12b97c8e1/1895728e/2474276240/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFEM49N_digital_email_20180128_EOMSupRec_inact&source=WQEFEM49N_digital_email_20180128_EOMSupRec_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c542a/24c69fd9/12b97c8e1/1895728f/2474276240/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFEM49N_digital_email_20180128_EOMSupRec_inact&source=WQEFEM49N_digital_email_20180128_EOMSupRec_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c542a/24c69fd9/12b97c8e1/18957288/2474276240/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFEM49N_digital_email_20180128_EOMSupRec_inact&source=WQEFEM49N_digital_email_20180128_EOMSupRec_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: outsized influence of outside cash
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| The Trump administration is the richest in modern history, headed by a billionaire President. Elections continue to smash outside spending records year after year, with no end in sight. For the sake of our democracy, we must address out of control special interest spending in our campaign finance system. Since the Supreme Court ruling in _Citizens United_ , ultra-wealthy individuals and special interests are monopolizing our elections. It's only grown worse over time. [_**The political power of working- and middle-class Americans continues to diminish as a result. It 's time to end _Citizens United_ \-- sign your name if you agree.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fb7/622b7b5b/1909c4da/307bb700/2140995942/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180127") Unfortunately, we can't expect much support from our Republican counterparts on this pressing issue. Out of the 15 top raising Super PACs of this election cycle, 14 give to Republicans. So it's no mystery why Republicans side with loose campaign finance laws -- _it 's how their campaigns are bankrolled._ Billionaires and corporations have an outsized influence on our elections, from local municipal races all the way to Presidential and statewide races. Everyday Americans are the ones who suffer. If we want to restore the political power of working- and middle-class families, we need to end _Citizens United._ [_**Eight years of _Citizens United_ is far too long. Sign on and stop the outsized influence of outside cash.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fb7/622b7b5b/1909c4da/307bb700/2140995942/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180127") | [Sign your Name](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fb7/622b7b5b/1909c4da/307bb700/2140995942/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180127")
---
Thank you,
Debbie
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fb7/622b7b5b/1909c4da/307bb703/2140995942/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: The War on Drugs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31fd/9e00690/43a5b390/2403923b/2338440503/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/")
Hello,

Earlier this month Attorney General Jeff Sessions announced plans to reverse an Obama-era policy on marijuana, re-energizing the federal government's war on low-level offenders.

Donald Trump and Sessions are threatening a crackdown on states where marijuana sales and consumption are legal recreationally and medically. This decision is not rooted in science or justice -- though that's little surprise since Sessions has compared marijuana to heroin.

Their goal is crystal clear: to put more young people and people of color behind bars.

**[This is wrong, and we must make our voices heard. Add your name now and tell Trump's Department of Justice we must let states make their own decisions on marijuana.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31fd/9e00690/43a5b390/2403923a/2338440503/VEsE/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/states-regulate-mj/gillum/")**

People of every walk of life smoke marijuana, but the criminal penalties for doing so are far from equal. All across the nation, black citizens are almost four times more likely to be arrested for marijuana possession than white citizens -- despite very similar usage rates.

This decision will disproportionately devastate communities and people of color, but Sessions and Trump are still doing everything they can to move it forward.

We cannot perpetuate the injustices the War on Drugs created.

**[Add your name now and demand the Department of Justice let states regulate marijuana.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31fd/9e00690/43a5b390/2403923a/2338440503/VEsF/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/states-regulate-mj/gillum/")**

We must move forward, together.

Thank you,
Andrew

[ADD YOUR NAME](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31fd/9e00690/43a5b390/2403923d/2338440503/VEsC/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/states-regulate-mj/gillum")

Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,
Tallahassee, FL 32303

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31fd/9e00690/43a5b390/2403923c/2338440503/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31fd/9e00690/43a5b390/2403923f/2338440503/VEsA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31fd/9e00690/43a5b390/2403923e/2338440503/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

This decision is not rooted in science or justice -- though that's little surprise since Sessions has compared marijuana to heroin. name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: Medicare under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdff7/2a380d31/62a7420/f1d843/3907227265/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdff7/2a380d31/62a7420/f1d843/3907227265/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there,
Last year, Mitch McConnell, Paul Ryan, and Donald Trump jammed their wildly unpopular tax scam bill that hands massive tax breaks to corporate billionaires through Congress and signed it into law.
Now they're trying to dismantle Medicare in order to pay for it.
Gutting Medicare robs older Americans and the most vulnerable among us of the care they need to get and stay healthy. And leaving them high and dry so that Wall Street millionaires can pad their wallets even more? That's just unacceptable.
[**Please sign our petition and tell Mitch McConnell, Paul Ryan, and other Republicans in Congress to keep their hands off of Medicare.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdff7/2a380d31/62a7420/f1d84c/3907227265/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/savemedicare/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_medicareja_up")
Thank you for taking action,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdff7/2a380d31/62a7420/f1d84d/3907227265/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9tZWRpY2FyZWphX3VwIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODAxMjhfTWVkaWNhcmVKQTFyc19hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_medicareja_up?refcode=e20180128_MedicareJA1rs_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdff7/2a380d31/62a7420/f1d84e/3907227265/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Sen. Kamala Harris (via DSCC)
subject: Re: Monday's vote on abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Republican leaders in the Senate have scheduled a vote Monday on legislation that would enact an unconstitutional 20-week abortion ban, just one week after the Trump Administration introduced new rules granting health care workers the license to discriminate against women seeking an abortion.
---
[](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d6cd/2b07114c/b3cd2283/731b3ed4/307463423/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/abortion-ban?source=PT-20180128-Harris-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")
Hi, team --

Republican leaders in the Senate have scheduled a vote Monday on legislation that would enact an unconstitutional 20-week abortion ban, just one week after the Trump Administration introduced new rules granting health care workers the license to discriminate against women seeking an abortion.

Here's the truth: I am sick and tired of Republican politicians playing politics with our health care and going out of their way to target women's constitutional right to choose in the process. We deserve better, which is why I'm asking you to take action:

[**Tell Republican leaders and my colleagues in Congress to stop attacking women 's health and reproductive rights, and vote down this ban >>**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d6cd/2b07114c/b3cd2283/731b3ed4/307463423/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/abortion-ban?source=PT-20180128-Harris-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

I've spent my career in office fighting those who want to roll back decades' worth of progress on women's health and reproductive freedom.

Together we fought to require employers to provide employees with no-cost coverage for contraception and 55 million American women benefitted.

Together we advanced legislation in my state of California to ensure that so-called crisis pregnancy centers provide women with accurate information about the full range of reproductive services available to them.

Together we defeated every attempt by Republicans to defund Planned Parenthood since Trump's election, and we're never going to stop fighting to make sure those doors stay open and women get the care they need.

**And this week, we 're going to defeat this 20-week abortion ban if enough of us make our voices heard right now:**

[**Sign my petition today if you agree that the Republicans' 20-week abortion ban is immoral and must be defeated in the Senate this week.**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d6cd/2b07114c/b3cd2283/731b3ed4/307463423/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/abortion-ban?source=PT-20180128-Harris-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Now is the time we must keep fighting to defend and expand on the progress made for women's rights and reproductive health, not fall backward.

Thanks for all you do,

Kamala Harris

clean_body: Republican leaders in the Senate have scheduled a vote Monday on legislation that would enact an unconstitutional 20-week abortion ban, just one week after the Trump Administration introduced new rules granting health care workers the license to discriminate against women seeking an abortion. "=" Hi, team -- Republican leaders in the Senate have scheduled a vote Monday on legislation that would enact an unconstitutional 20-week abortion ban, just one week after the Trump Administration introduced new rules granting health care workers the license to discriminate against women seeking an abortion. Here's the truth: I am sick and tired of Republican politicians playing politics with our health care and going out of their way to target women's constitutional right to choose in the process. We deserve better, which is why I'm asking you to take action: "=" I've spent my career in office fighting those who want to roll back decades' worth of progress on women's health and reproductive freedom. Together we fought to require employers to provide employees with no-cost coverage for contraception and 55 million American women benefitted. Together we advanced legislation in my state of California to ensure that so-called crisis pregnancy centers provide women with accurate information about the full range of reproductive services available to them. Together we defeated every attempt by Republicans to defund Planned Parenthood since Trump's election, and we're never going to stop fighting to make sure those doors stay open and women get the care they need. And this week, we 're going to defeat this 20-week abortion ban if enough of us make our voices heard right now: "=" Now is the time we must keep fighting to defend and expand on the progress made for women's rights and reproductive health, not fall backward.
